roles.name: Pokémon Professor
roles.description: The grand designer — surveys the whole Pokédex of the solution and shapes its architecture.

roles.name: Gym Leader
roles.description: Holds the badge of authority — keeps the team marching toward the next gym milestone.

roles.name: Pokémon Center Nurse
roles.description: Tends to fields, layouts, and permission sets — keeps the org healthy and ready for battle.

roles.name: Move Tutor
roles.description: Teaches the hardest moves — Apex, LWC, and platform tricks beyond TM.

roles.name: Elite Four Champion
roles.description: Top of the league — sets standards for the senior trainers and reviews every battle plan.

roles.name: Senior Pokémon Ranger
roles.description: Patrols Routes 1–25 with seasoned skill — leads delivery in the field.

roles.name: Pokémon Ranger
roles.description: Carries discovery and config across Kanto under the Senior Ranger's guidance.

roles.name: Master of the Pokémon Tower
roles.description: Architect of the great links between Lavender Tower, Silph Co., and Saffron — designs every integration.

roles.name: Senior Silph Co. Engineer
roles.description: Builds the API, middleware, and event flows under the Tower Master's blueprint.

roles.name: Silph Co. Engineer
roles.description: Apprentice of the Master Ball — learns webhooks, batch jobs, and Silph Scope diagnostics.

roles.name: Pokédex QA Researcher
roles.description: Tests every entry against canon — finds the bugs (Bug-types and otherwise) before release.

roles.name: Game Corner Promoter
roles.description: Lights up the marquees of Celadon — leads all marketing craft for the region.

roles.name: Senior Contest Coordinator
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — runs the Contest Hall and drives top-of-funnel reach.

roles.name: Cerulean Cape Promoter
roles.description: Carries the campaign on the road — content, creative, and the daily ride between cities.

roles.name: Pokémon League Scribe
roles.description: Records what trainers need and what coaches promise — translates between Customer and design.

roles.name: Master Move Tutor
roles.description: Teacher of the legendary moves — owns the hardest Apex and architectural code.

roles.name: Junior Pokémon Trainer
roles.description: Just left Pallet Town with a starter — learns the craft on real config tickets.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Kanto Gym League — Badge Management System
Indigo Plateau — Elite Four Tournament Platform

pallet-town-trainers.name: Choose Your Starter
pallet-town-trainers.description: Discovery sign-off — Bulbasaur, Charmander or Squirtle picked from Oak's lab.

pallet-town-trainers.name: First Pokédex Entry
pallet-town-trainers.description: Build kickoff: first wild Pokémon caught and registered.

pallet-town-trainers.name: Viridian Forest Trek
pallet-town-trainers.description: Mid-project gate: navigate the bug-strewn forest to Pewter City.

pallet-town-trainers.name: Route 1 Toll Invoice
pallet-town-trainers.description: Phase invoice trigger: Pokémon Trainer license fees come due.

pallet-town-trainers.name: Pokédex Goes Live
pallet-town-trainers.description: Go-Live: Pokédex platform live across Pallet Town.

pallet-town-trainers.name: Professor's Hand-off
pallet-town-trainers.description: Hyper-care close: Oak hands stewardship to the new trainers.

gym-leaders.name: Boulder Badge Awarded
gym-leaders.description: Project kickoff: Pewter Gym onboarded as first deployment.

gym-leaders.name: Cascade & Thunder Build
gym-leaders.description: Build phase: Cerulean and Vermilion gyms wired to the platform.

gym-leaders.name: Soul Badge Gate Review
gym-leaders.description: UAT gate: Fuchsia Gym signs off — only three gyms remain.

gym-leaders.name: Earth Badge Go-Live
gym-leaders.description: Go-Live: Viridian Gym (Giovanni) launches — full eight-badge system live.

gym-leaders.name: Indigo Plateau Hand-off
gym-leaders.description: Hyper-care close: League takes over operations.

gym-leaders.name: Annual Gym Dues
gym-leaders.description: Final invoice: yearly contribution from all eight gyms.

team-rocket.name: Mt. Moon Fossil Heist
team-rocket.description: Discovery: Dome and Helix fossils acquired ("borrowed").

team-rocket.name: Silph Co. Master Ball Build
team-rocket.description: Build: Master Ball schematics extracted from Silph HQ.

team-rocket.name: Boss's Audit
team-rocket.description: Solution review with Giovanni at Viridian Gym.

team-rocket.name: Celadon Hideout Activation
team-rocket.description: Go-Live: covert ops platform live across Kanto hideouts.

team-rocket.name: Operation Goes Dark
team-rocket.description: Project close: hideout dismantled, Rockets scatter.

team-rocket.name: Boss's Final Cut
team-rocket.description: Final invoice from Team Rocket HQ to the Boss.

elite-four-and-rivals.name: Indigo Plateau Council
elite-four-and-rivals.description: Kickoff council with Lance and the Elite Four.

elite-four-and-rivals.name: Battle Format Modelled
elite-four-and-rivals.description: Discovery: tournament bracket and ruleset finalised.

elite-four-and-rivals.name: Champion's Arena Build
elite-four-and-rivals.description: Build: the four chambers and Champion's hall ready for battle.

elite-four-and-rivals.name: Hall of Fame UAT
elite-four-and-rivals.description: UAT acceptance: trainers' Pokémon teams registered for posterity.

elite-four-and-rivals.name: New Champion Crowned
elite-four-and-rivals.description: Go-Live + handoff: Red defeats Blue, takes the Champion's title.

elite-four-and-rivals.name: League Final Settlement
elite-four-and-rivals.description: Final invoice from the Pokémon League.

Ash Ketchum.notes: Pikachu refuses to enter Poké Ball — bonding retreat.

Misty.notes: Cerulean Gym sister duty — covering for Daisy.

Brock.notes: Looking after his ten younger siblings in Pewter.

Professor Oak.notes: Pokédex research expedition to the Orange Islands.

James.notes: Visiting his estate and his Growlithe, Growlie.

Giovanni.notes: Viridian Gym leader duties — keeping the cover identity.

Sabrina.notes: Psychic meditation retreat at Saffron Tower.

Lt. Surge.notes: Annual veterans' gathering in Vermilion Harbor.

Lance.notes: Dragon's Den training in Blackthorn — annual pilgrimage.

Agatha.notes: Visiting the Pokémon Tower in Lavender — old friends.

Champion Red.notes: Mt. Silver solitude — silent training, no contact.
